External Dependencies

The external module is a utility module that hosts third-party libraries locally. This ensures that the Hams.com platform remains fully functional even without access to the global internet.

Leaflet.js

Used for rendering maps in the World Map and Operator Directory. We host version 1.9.4.

Transformers.js

Used for Edge AI processing, such as recognizing callsigns in speech. We host version 2.16.1.

Security & Privacy

By hosting these files locally, we prevent third-party CDNs from tracking our users' IP addresses and usage patterns.
